overall.description: A bird of prey, likely an eagle, flies over a Mediterranean-style coastal landscape in a video game. The flight begins over deep blue ocean waters near rocky cliffs with ancient ships visible, passes along sandy beaches, then transitions inland over rocky canyons and forested mountain valleys under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open ocean near rocky coastline with ancient ships

events.description: ancient wooden trireme ships become visible scattered across the water below
sandy beach and shoreline cliffs come into view on the left side

agents.ego_description: soaring over open ocean water with wings fully spread, following the coastline trajectory

entered.detail: tall stone cliffs rising from the ocean with layered rock formations
deep blue sea with visible depth variations and light reflections
multiple ancient trireme-style vessels with sails scattered across the water
hazy mountains visible on the horizon beyond the water

segments.scene_description: The eagle soars over deep blue ocean waters under a clear sky. Rocky coastal cliffs rise on the left while ancient wooden ships are scattered across the water below. The camera follows the bird as sandy beaches come into view along the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal shoreline with beaches and rock formations

events.description: eagle banks left and begins flying inland over rocky terrain, leaving the ocean behind

agents.ego_description: flying along the coastline, passing over sandy beaches and rocky outcrops, then banking inland toward the mountains

entered.detail: sandy beach area with gentle waves lapping at the shore
natural stone arch formation extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The eagle follows the coastline, flying over sandy beaches and rocky outcrops. Ancient ships fade into the distance as the bird banks inland, leaving the ocean behind and approaching the rocky cliffs and canyons of the interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky inland hills and canyons with sparse forest

events.description: eagle descends and banks sharply to navigate through a rocky canyon
dense pine forest becomes visible in the valleys below as altitude decreases

agents.ego_description: flying low over rocky terrain and canyons, navigating between cliff walls and descending toward the valley floor

entered.detail: steep rock walls and boulders forming a canyon landscape
individual pine trees dotting the rocky hillside
narrow dirt trail winding through the valley below

segments.scene_description: Flying inland over rocky canyon terrain, the eagle descends between cliff walls. Scattered pine trees dot the landscape below, and a winding dirt path becomes visible through the valley as the bird navigates the rugged interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain valleys with dense pine coverage

events.description: eagle banks sharply right to navigate through a narrow mountain valley between peaks

agents.ego_description: soaring through mountain valleys, flying between forested peaks and over dense woodland canopy

entered.detail: thick forest of pine trees covering the mountain slopes
tall rocky mountain peaks surrounding the valley

segments.scene_description: The eagle flies through forested mountain valleys, with dense pine forests covering the slopes below. Tall mountain peaks rise in the background as the bird banks sharply to navigate the winding valley, moving deeper into the rugged interior landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that begins over a deep blue ocean and gradually transitions into a rugged, forested mountain interior. It begins with the eagle soaring past rocky coastal cliffs and ancient wooden ships scattered across the water, moving steadily toward the shoreline as sandy beaches come into view. As the bird banks inland, the ocean and ships fade into the distance, and the open coastline shifts into a landscape of rocky canyons and steep cliff walls. The camera then descends into the valley, where the terrain transforms from barren rock to a rugged interior dotted with pine trees and a winding dirt path. Finally, the scene expands into dense forested mountain valleys, with the eagle navigating between towering peaks and thick pine slopes as it moves deeper into the wilderness.
